g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Aadhaar image preprocessing')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about user selfie preprocessing')
sendPrompt('What super resolution models work best for Aadhaar face matching?')
sendPrompt('What super resolution models work best for user selfie face matching?')
sendPrompt('How does RetinaFace or MTCNN detect faces in low quality images?')
sendPrompt('How does RetinaFace or MTCNN detect faces in user selfies?')
sendPrompt('How does 5-point landmark alignment work for face recognition?')
sendPrompt('How does 5-point landmark alignment work for user selfie?')
sendPrompt('How does InsightFace ArcFace generate 512-d face embeddings?')
sendPrompt('How is cosine similarity used for face verification scoring?')
sendPrompt('What open source vision LLMs can verify face match quality?')
sendPrompt('What confidence thresholds should be used for Aadhaar KYC face match?')
